nasb.text: They shall perform the duties for him and for the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, to do the service of the tabernacle.

esv.text: They shall keep guard over him and over the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, as they minister at the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 他們要替亞倫和全體會眾，在會幕前盡上本分，辦理帳幕的事。

ccb.text: 他们要为亚伦和全体会众在会幕司职，办理圣幕的事务，
